spec.name: Climbing The Great Pyramid
spec.description: Hot air rises off the sides of the pyramid, and the wind chokes you with a flurry of sand and dust. The walls of the pyramid are quite steep, and you are having trouble keeping from sliding down into the sands below.

east.description: If you are daring you could try to skirt around to the eastern side.

west.description: If you are daring you could try to skirt around to the western side.

up.description: It looks too dangerous to try to climb any higher.

down.description: This side of the pyramid has a dangerous drop before the sandy floor.

extra_descs.description: You wonder how anyone could have built such a massive thing out in this heat.
